name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Reaching for a big goal today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Our goal in this campaign is to build a movement of people who want to take back their country from the billionaire class. We do that one person and one contribution at a time, in order to earn the votes we need to win the Democratic nomination and the White House.
When we started, no one thought we would get very far. They saw that we were up against one of the best-organized political machines in history, complete with super PACs and Wall Street money.
Today our opponent hosted a big-dollar fundraiser with the financial elite in New York City. I've heard that these events can typically raise hundreds of thousands of dollars each, or more -- and their campaign has a lot of them on the calendar this month.
**So, in the spirit of this campaign, we're going to reach for a big goal -- to show the strength of our movement by raising $1 million today.** We're on our way there right now. **[Can you contribute $3 now to help us reach our goal by midnight tonight?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm")**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm")**
Our campaign is showing the billionaire class that they can't have it all. That no longer can they buy our elections and our democracy.
We're building our effort in a different way, and I think that we can send a very strong message if we hit our goal of raising $1 million today.
**[Please chip in $3 now to help us reach our goal by midnight tonight.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216-pm")**
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

name: Rand Paul
subject: I’m committed to winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

Want to know something worse than the thought
of a liberal winning the White House in November?
Think of a bunch of liberals controlling the
Senate.
This is a real possibility in 2016 with so
many Republican seats up for grabs and let me tell you -- if the
Democrats win big in the Senate, the White House won't even
matter.
Here's why:
Following the passing of Justice Scalia,
President Obama made it more than clear he wants to push through
a radical, activist Supreme Court nominee to continue his legacy.
Right now, the GOP controls the Senate and I,
along with many others, have vowed to reject any nominee without
an originalist interpretation of the Constitution.
There's no way a liberal nominee is getting
through on our watch.
But as NBCNews pointed out yesterday, there's
a loophole. Obama could win the Supreme Court battle even if the
Republicans win the White House.
That's because the Constitution mandates that
a new Congress begins January 3rd, while President Obama is still
in office until January 20. That means losing too many GOP seats
in November would give the President two weeks with a Democrat
majority.
This would enable President Obama to send a
nominee and with a Democrat Senate, where they could (and
probably would) apply the 'nuclear option' and vote in the
nominee with a simple majority.
That would be a complete nightmare.
This has made it more clear than ever that
the role of the Senate is vital to maintaining liberty.
We have to do everything we can to make sure
the GOP maintains control of the Senate or we'll be looking at a
court that completely rejects Scalia's idea of originalism.
Do you want the next generation burdened with
a Supreme Court motivated by politics and feelings, rather than
the Constitution?
I certainly don't.
Patriot, I need your help to make sure I make
it back for another term in January to stand up for liberty in
Washington.
Without a strong conservative Senate, we
cannot ensure that our courts will be doing what the founders of
this nation intended.
I'm committed to winning this fight against
Obama's Supreme Court nominee.
Please stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Yesterday morning, Ted Cruz rolled out his plan to rebuild our
military, and he rallied with veterans in the afternoon.

We are seeing men and
women in uniform stand with Cruz because they want a leader who
will protect our families at home and who will have their back.
Yesterday, Sgt. Dakota Meyer endorsed Ted Cruz for President. He
is the third living recipient of the Medal of Honor since the
Vietnam War. We are also honored to add Lt. General William
Boykin, Brigadier General Blaine Holt, Yinon Weiss, and Sgt. Tim
Lee as national co-chairs of our Vets for Ted coalition.

Veterans and
Americans of all different backgrounds are coming together to
make sure that we elect Ted Cruz so we may once again say with

Best,

name: Ted Cruz (urgent, personal)
subject: Read this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
This won't be my typical email to you. I hope you will take a moment to read it. |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33604558:spuEQ1CYN:m:1:1104269936:E5082BC8E4887D6BFD41B4780B067276:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Dear Friend,

This won't be my typical email to you. I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**If you are like me, you are probably getting a little tired of all the noise and media frenzy around this campaign.** The personal attacks and outright false claims are staggering.

There is so much misleading information flying around on cable TV, the internet and the so-called "mainstream" media -- it's enough to make good people abandon this process and just turn it off altogether.

**But, Friend, despite how frustrating this process is -- it is of critical importance.** I will never give up fighting for Americans and working to win this campaign because so much is on the line.

_I hope and pray you won't give up either._

In fact, I'm so committed to winning this campaign I want to make you a personal commitment today (and in a second I'm going to ask you to make a commitment in return).

First, my commitment to you:

1. **I will always be a consistent conservative** \-- both in word and deed. You will never have to worry about me caving to the Washington establishment.
2. **I will always shoot straight with you.** I will tell the truth. I will apologize when I make a mistake.
3. **I will run an honorable campaign.** I will discuss the difference between candidates, but I will not engage in personal negative attacks. And when I'm personally attacked, I will not respond in kind with vicious below-the-belt revenge attacks.
4. **I will be a good steward of your support** and financial investment in me. I want you to know your support is faithfully used.
5. **I will work as hard as I can,** make personal and professional sacrifices to win this campaign, and reignite liberty in our nation.

I don't make these commitments lightly. They are my heartfelt vows to you.

If you accept these commitments as my open pledge to you, **then I'm hoping you will make a commitment to me as well.**

Your commitment would mean a great deal to me, as I am just days away from the votes being cast in South Carolina, and the stakes are incredibly high.

[YES, I COMMIT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33604558:spuEQ1CYN:m:1:1104269936:E5082BC8E4887D6BFD41B4780B067276:r)

**Honestly Friend, to win this campaign,[I'm going to need your commitment because I cannot do it alone.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33604558:spuEQ1CYN:m:1:1104269936:E5082BC8E4887D6BFD41B4780B067276:r)**

That's why I hope you will make the following commitment to me:

1. **Commit to pray.** In the words of our savior Jesus Christ, where two or more gather, He is there. And while I am blessed with an incredible prayer team, I hope I can count on your prayers as well.
2. **Commit to vote.** No matter which state you live in, your vote will have the power to help shape this country, and I hope you will commit to vote for me.
3. **Commit to support to this campaign** and make an important donation when I need it most.

Our campaign is coming up against the most brutal opposition only days before the next primary votes are to be cast, and to overcome it, I need the renewed commitment of each and every supporter of my campaign -- no matter the size.

subject: I’m asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Dear Friend --

You may have seen this week, that for the first time since I left office, I hit the campaign trail. It brought back fond memories, but something else stood out: I sensed Americans are yearning for a strong leader.

I'd like to remind you and the voters what true strength means. Strength means facing challenges and prevailing. It means sacrificing and enduring, and emerging a better and bigger person. It means having a set of core principles -- beliefs that are true on the campaign trail and will stay true in office.

**Strength is not empty rhetoric. It is not bluster. It is not theatrics.**

Real strength, strength of purpose, comes from integrity and character. And in my experience, the strongest person usually isn't the loudest one in the room. I've seen in my brother a quiet conviction and a core of conscience that cannot be shaken.

My hope is that you see that too, and you'll join me is supporting him with a gift of just $1 now: [**Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ezsljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwctpdrh_plcmmdvf.html)

body:
Friend -- I was beyond thankful to have George's support on the trail this week, and the momentum since then has been incredible.

But we're still short of our goal even after he emailed you this morning. We need to change that, and fast.

**So until midnight tonight, a group of donors will match every contribution 100%. That 's right -- your support will go twice as far at the time when we need it the most.**

We only have 3 days until South Carolina, Friend. We need you now more than ever, you have to hurry. This only lasts til midnight -- and then this link will expire:

[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rrkfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbskwctt_tcmvvjpw.html)

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ylqryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwfcsbc_tcmvvjpw.html)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: President George W. Bush
Subject: I'm asking**
Dear Friend --

You may have seen this week, that for the first time since I left office, I hit the campaign trail. It brought back fond memories, but something else stood out: I sensed Americans are yearning for a strong leader.

I'd like to remind you and the voters what true strength means. Strength means facing challenges and prevailing. It means sacrificing and enduring, and emerging a better and bigger person. It means having a set of core principles -- beliefs that are true on the campaign trail and will stay true in office.

**Strength is not empty rhetoric. It is not bluster. It is not theatrics.**

Real strength, strength of purpose, comes from integrity and character. And in my experience, the strongest person usually isn't the loudest one in the room. I've seen in my brother a quiet conviction and a core of conscience that cannot be shaken.

body:
We're less than two weeks out. | Friend --

A dozen contests in a single day with more than 800 delegates on the line -- if we win big, we'll be well on our way to the nomination. clean_body: | Friend -- Richard Shelby is running scared -- he's spent more money on television ads than any member of congress, many of them attempting to trash my name. Jonathan Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell

subject: the Supreme Court is on the line

body:
| | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22f9/738133e4/34ccab19/7f83d756/3938527153/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160217?refcode=pme160217_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Friends,

The Supreme Court vacancy changed EVERYTHING.

Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz and other Senate Republicans are going to try their hardest to ignore the Constitution and refuse to confirm any Supreme Court nomination from President Obama.

If they're successful, the Senate we elect in November will have the power to drastically impact the Supreme Court for many years to come. **Important decisions on _Citizens United_ , Planned Parenthood and voting rights already hang in the balance. **

It has never been more clear that Patrick needs to win to turn the Senate blue. Nothing less than the future of the Supreme Court is on the line.

[**The developments this week mean that our Take Back the Senate Fund goal has skyrocketed to $30,000. Will you step up and help us get there?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22f9/738133e4/34ccab19/7f83d756/3938527153/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160217?refcode=pme160217_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

We cannot afford to have another Republican-controlled Senate. Too much is at stake.

Thanks for your support,

Team Murphy
